title: isandrina nutans
side_effects: Isandrina nutans can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps due to the high levels of toxic compounds present in the plant. In severe cases, consuming large amounts of the plant can lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Additionally, improper use of isandrina nutans may also cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
